data.startup_idea: FAST BookSwap: campus marketplace for used books
data.value_proposition: A campus-first marketplace that helps students buy, sell, and exchange used academic books at affordable prices.
user_stories: As a student, I want to search books by course so I can find relevant material.
As a seller, I want to post my used books so I can recover costs.
As a buyer, I want to contact seller directly so I can negotiate price.

content.social_post: FAST BookSwap is here! Exchange books with students.
content.cold_email: Join FAST BookSwap to access affordable study materials.
content.slack_message: FAST BookSwap: campus marketplace for used books launching soon!

payload.feedback: Add stronger CTA button and contact email. | Marketing message should include urgency.
Add stronger CTA button and contact email. | Marketing message should include urgency.
payload.llm_decision: The current conversion path is weak. Strengthening the CTA and adding direct contact info reduces friction, while urgency is a proven driver for marketing performance.
payload.revision_instruction: Enhance the visual prominence of the CTA button, insert a clear contact email in the footer or contact section, and rewrite the primary marketing copy to include time-sensitive language or limited-time offers.
